title: DESCHUTES COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DESCHUTES COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for people experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises. Crisis services are provided to any individual in need; insurance coverage is not required. Services may include assessment, intervention planning, and information and referral services. Brief crisis stabilization through individual or group treatment may also be provided. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk in: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Email (541) 322-7500 9 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 322-7500 ext 9 Toll-free (800) 875-7364 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services or walk in during business hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
